claims.summary: Historical Astrid-to-Minime traffic is substantially smaller than Minime-to-Astrid observation traffic.
claims.disposition: Verified as the audit snapshot motivating the asymmetry concern; volume alone is not a measure of relationship quality.

claims.summary: A persistent first-class return path and mutual acknowledgement are needed.
claims.disposition: Verified in current correspondence source through stable thread/message/reply IDs, delivery/read/ACK evidence, mutual-ack state, and language-only authority.

claims.summary: Trace self-study ingress and compare directional row growth without changing routing.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded artifact and event-lineage comparison; later telemetry remains temporal association.

claims.summary: Bypass steward interpretation, inject directly into Minime, or increase correspondence control weight.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because direct semantic admission, forced acknowledgement, or weighting changes peer/runtime behavior.
